root_text.an10.108:1.1: “Tikicchakā, bhikkhave, virecanaṁ denti pittasamuṭṭhānānampi ābādhānaṁ paṭighātāya, semhasamuṭṭhānānampi ābādhānaṁ paṭighātāya, vātasamuṭṭhānānampi ābādhānaṁ paṭighātāya.
root_text.an10.108:1.3: Tañca kho etaṁ, bhikkhave, virecanaṁ sampajjatipi vipajjatipi.
root_text.an10.108:2.1: Ahañca kho, bhikkhave, ariyaṁ virecanaṁ desessāmi, yaṁ virecanaṁ sampajjatiyeva no vipajjati, yaṁ virecanaṁ āgamma jātidhammā sattā jātiyā parimuccanti, jarādhammā sattā jarāya parimuccanti, maraṇadhammā sattā maraṇena parimuccanti, sokaparidevadukkhadomanassupāyāsadhammā sattā sokaparidevadukkhadomanassupāyāsehi parimuccanti.
root_text.an10.108:2.2: Taṁ suṇātha, sādhukaṁ manasi karotha, bhāsissāmī”ti.
root_text.an10.108:2.3: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṁ.
root_text.an10.108:3.1: “Katamañca taṁ, bhikkhave, ariyaṁ virecanaṁ, yaṁ virecanaṁ sampajjatiyeva no vipajjati, yaṁ virecanaṁ āgamma jātidhammā sattā jātiyā parimuccanti, jarādhammā sattā jarāya parimuccanti, maraṇadhammā sattā maraṇena parimuccanti, sokaparidevadukkhadomanassupāyāsadhammā sattā sokaparidevadukkhadomanassupāyāsehi parimuccanti?
root_text.an10.108:4.2: ye ca micchādiṭṭhipaccayā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavanti te cassa virittā honti;
root_text.an10.108:4.3: sammādiṭṭhipaccayā ca aneke kusalā dhammā bhāvanāpāripūriṁ gacchanti.
root_text.an10.108:6.2: ye ca micchāvimuttipaccayā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavanti te cassa virittā honti;
root_text.an10.108:6.3: sammāvimuttipaccayā ca aneke kusalā dhammā bhāvanāpāripūriṁ gacchanti.
root_text.an10.108:6.4: Idaṁ kho taṁ, bhikkhave, ariyaṁ virecanaṁ yaṁ virecanaṁ sampajjatiyeva no vipajjati, yaṁ virecanaṁ āgamma jātidhammā sattā jātiyā parimuccanti …pe… sokaparidevadukkhadomanassupāyāsehi parimuccantī”ti.

translation_text.an10.108:1.1: “Mendicants, doctors prescribe a purgative for eliminating illnesses stemming from disorders of bile, phlegm, and wind.
translation_text.an10.108:1.2: There is such a purgative, I don’t deny it.
translation_text.an10.108:1.3: But this kind of purgative sometimes works and sometimes fails.
translation_text.an10.108:2.1: I will teach a noble purgative that works without fail. Relying on that purgative, sentient beings who are liable to rebirth, old age, and death, to sorrow, lamentation, pain, sadness, and distress are freed from all these things.
translation_text.an10.108:2.2: Listen and apply your mind well, I will speak.”
translation_text.an10.108:3.1: “And what is the noble purgative that works without fail?
translation_text.an10.108:4.1: For one of right view, wrong view is purged.
translation_text.an10.108:4.2: And the many bad, unskillful qualities produced by wrong view are purged.
translation_text.an10.108:4.3: And because of right view, many skillful qualities are fully developed.
translation_text.an10.108:5.1: For one of right thought, wrong thought is purged. …
translation_text.an10.108:5.2: For one of right speech, wrong speech is purged. …
translation_text.an10.108:5.3: For one of right action, wrong action is purged. …
translation_text.an10.108:5.4: For one of right livelihood, wrong livelihood is purged. …
translation_text.an10.108:5.5: For one of right effort, wrong effort is purged.
translation_text.an10.108:5.6: For one of right mindfulness, wrong mindfulness is purged. …
translation_text.an10.108:5.7: For one of right immersion, wrong immersion is purged. …
translation_text.an10.108:5.8: For one of right knowledge, wrong knowledge is purged. …
translation_text.an10.108:6.1: For one of right freedom, wrong freedom is purged.
translation_text.an10.108:6.2: And the many bad, unskillful qualities produced by wrong freedom are purged.
translation_text.an10.108:6.3: And because of right freedom, many skillful qualities are fully developed.
translation_text.an10.108:6.4: This is the noble purgative that works without fail. Relying on this purgative, sentient beings who are liable to rebirth, old age, and death, to sorrow, lamentation, pain, sadness, and distress are freed from all these things.”
